blockers: cpu0 governor is 'powersave'; set it to 'performance' for stable benchmark timing
host load 44.30 exceeds the isolated threshold 1.00; quiesce concurrent jobs

notes: the latency budget is a software budget/telemetry surface measured on a local statevector simulator; it is not a hardware measurement and makes no hardware latency claim

wall-clock samples measured on a shared host: advisory only

methods_sections.text: Mid-circuit measurement feeds a classical update policy that adjusts the next-round coupling parameter under explicit policy gates.
Software-in-the-loop latency records per-round wall-clock samples and fails closed on max, p95, p99, or total-budget breaches.
Provider-prepared and live-QPU claims stay unpromoted until the hardware policy authorises a live ticket and artefacts exist.

package.title: Closed-Loop Quantum Control Evidence Package

package_markdown:
# Closed-Loop Quantum Control Evidence Package

Publication scaffold only: separates software-in-the-loop simulation, provider-prepared dynamic-circuit readiness, and true live closed-loop QPU evidence; not live closed-loop QPU evidence until a live-ticket run adds provider job IDs, raw counts, calibration snapshots, and replay artefacts.

## Evidence Classes
- `software_in_loop_simulation`: software-in-the-loop closed-loop latency measurement; measures local controller/simulator wall-clock time only; not provider-prepared dynamic-circuit evidence and not live closed-loop QPU evidence
- `provider_prepared_dynamic_circuit`: requires backend capability proof, transpiled dynamic circuit, provider preparation metadata, and no-submit policy approval
- `live_closed_loop_qpu`: requires explicit live ticket, allow-listed backend, raw counts, calibration snapshot, job IDs, and replay harness

## Benchmark Rows
- `software_in_loop_latency`: pass=False; max_round_latency_s=0.081012575; p95_round_latency_s=0.058049865

## Claim Ledger Rows
- `closed_loop_software_latency`: unpromoted — software-in-the-loop latency report only
- `closed_loop_provider_dynamic_circuit`: blocked — provider preparation artefacts pending
- `closed_loop_live_qpu`: blocked — live hardware artefacts pending
